title: Vijay Sales is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Vijay Sales is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!
